Explanation: Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the SMQTT_SESSION table, which may retrieve unnecessary data and impact performance. Consider using select() with only the specific columns needed (TOPIC, QOS, BODY, CLIENT_ID, RETAIN).
Using selectFrom() fetches all columns from the SMQTT_RETAIN table when only TOPIC, QOS, and BODY are used. Consider using select() with only the required columns to improve query efficiency.
